{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = The crown
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The crown]] is a sacred charge held by [[Captain Tommison]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“Of course!” Tommison blustered. “I would scarcely abandon my sacred charge.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
